content: Greenhouse CLI uses Commander with registerXxxCommand(program: Command) factory pattern. Each command file exports a register function; cli.ts wires them. Out-of-scope command imports are commented out with TODO notes pointing to the responsible agent.

Greenhouse ops command files (runs, poll, ingest, ship, logs, budget) use registerXxxCommand(program: Command) factory pattern, only import from 'commander', implement placeholder stubs per SPEC.md CLI signatures.
